name: cpig-bool-refactor-09-three-operand-fold
description: CPigUnion of three libfive spheres in a single pick. Exercises the N-ARY FOLD in RunBooleanFromPicks (CPigModelingCommands.cs:219-237 — accumulator pattern ((c0 op c1) op c2) ...). Each intermediate composite is disposed in-loop; the final composite owns the result. Phase 1 still works through this fold (all libfive → libfive fast path). TEST GATE: 3-pick union completes, real frame presents. Visual: three-sphere blob.

checkpoints.name: three-operand-union
checkpoints.description: Union of three spheres along the X axis (-18, 0, +18). Visible as a single connected SDF surface (peanut-of-three). Tests the N-ary fold inside RunBooleanFromPicks.
